results.description: (MENAFN - Mid-East Info) Generally available today, ZoomMate combines agentic search, AI-generated presentations and deliverables, and automated execution in Salesforce, Jira, Slack, ServiceNow, ...

results.title: Skoda Peaq to debut on June 23; design sketch reveals more details
results.description: Skoda Peaq is close making its global debut and the brand recently revealed more details about the upcoming electric SUV with new sketches. It is likely to come with 63 kWh and 91 kWh battery packs.
